column3: П„ вҖӢ ( [ ПҶ 1 ] вҖӢ рқ’° [ [ a ] , [ b ] ] вҖӢ [ ПҶ 2 ] ) \displaystyle\tau\bigl([\varphi_{1}]\;\mathcal{U}_{[[a],[b]]}\;[\varphi_{2}]\bigr)
column4: := П„ вҖӢ ( [ ПҶ 1 ] ) вҲ§ ( j вүӨ j 0 + b ) вҖӢ рқ’° вҖӢ П„ вҖӢ ( [ ПҶ 2 ] ) вҲ§ ( j вүҘ j 0 + a ) \displaystyle:=\tau([\varphi_{1}])\land(j\leq j_{0}+b)\;\mathcal{U}\;\tau([\varphi_{2}])\land(j\geq j_{0}+a)

column3: П„ вҖӢ ( в—Ҷ [ [ a ] , [ b ] ] вҖӢ [ ПҶ ] ) \displaystyle\tau\bigl(\lozenge_{[[a],[b]]}[\varphi]\bigr)
column4: := П„ вҖӢ ( вҠӨ рқ’° [ [ a ] , [ b ] ] вҖӢ [ ПҶ ] ) \displaystyle:=\tau\bigl(\top\;\mathcal{U}_{[[a],[b]]}\;[\varphi]\bigr)

column3: П„ вҖӢ ( в–Ў [ [ a ] , [ b ] ] вҖӢ [ ПҶ ] ) \displaystyle\tau\bigl(\square_{[[a],[b]]}[\varphi]\bigr)
column4: := В¬ в—Ҷ [ [ a ] , [ b ] ] вҖӢ В¬ [ ПҶ ] \displaystyle:=\neg\lozenge_{[[a],[b]]}\neg[\varphi]
